#### `circleci my runs [flags]`

List your recent runs grouped by project

| Flag          | Description                                                |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| `--jq string` | Process values from the response using jq syntax           |
| `--json`      | Output as JSON                                             |
| `--limit int` | Maximum number of runs to fetch [default: 20] (default 20) |


**Aliases:**


`circleci my run`
